Metadata

App: Dimpact e2e test
Test Environment: Test

Feature:Login 5

Scenario:
Bob wants to login to ZAC
3

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 249ms

When "Bob" logs in 811ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 866ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 750ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 426ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 938ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 34ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 733ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 28ms

When "Bob" logs in 622ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 805ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 741ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 643ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 867ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 20ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 823ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 27ms

When "Bob" logs in 601ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 807ms

Screenshot

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" < 1ms

And the page is done searching < 1ms

And there are at least 3 zaken < 1ms

When "Bob" selects that number of zaken < 1ms

And "Bob" distributes the zaken to the first group available < 1ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the distribution of zaken is starting < 1ms

And after a while the snackbar disappears < 1ms

Bob releases zaken

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" < 1ms

And the page is done searching < 1ms

When "Bob" selects that number of zaken < 1ms

And "Bob" releases the zaken < 1ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the releasement of zaken is starting < 1ms

And after a while the snackbar disappears < 1ms

Feature:Taken verdelen / vrijgeven 2

Bob distributes taken to a group
